breakdown: PR widens state flag semantics in game_state.py to accept LLM numeric booleans (1, '1', 0, '0') in addition to existing True/'true' and False/'false'. Adds comprehensive test class StateFlagSemanticsTest covering accepted/rejected values and the bool-subclass-of-int edge case. Code is well-typed with proper isinstance checks excluding bool from int branch.
key_changes: Widen _is_state_flag_true to accept int 1 and string '1'
Widen _is_state_flag_false to accept int 0 and string '0'
Add test class StateFlagSemanticsTest with 5 test methods covering accepted/rejected values
Handle bool subclass of int edge case with explicit isinstance check
Update docstrings to explain widened acceptance and production rationale
